name: lab10-qa-server
description: LangChain quiz agent with MCP and standalone modes

scripts.chat: node cli.js --mode mcp --topic langchain --message 'give me a question?'
scripts.chat1: node cli.js --mode mcp --topic mcp --message 'give me a question?'
scripts.chat2: node cli.js --mode mcp --topic mcp --message 'try to insert new topic'
scripts.chat3: node cli.js --mode mcp --topic mcp --message 'add new question to the questions list'
